name: bainder
description: Browser extension (chrome, edge, firefox to come) to organize AI browser chats (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) into a hierarchical notebook with topics, table of contents, and search functionality.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:edge
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/package.js chrome
scripts.package:edge: npm run build:edge && node scripts/package.js edge
scripts.package:all: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:edge

author: Avraham Y. Kahana
